paper_title: Lipidomic Analysis of WT and Transgenic Cells

methods.description: This method involves the use of mass spectrometry (ESI-MS/MS) to perform a comprehensive lipidomic analysis comparing glycerolipid profiles of WT and transgenic strains under N-replete and N-deplete conditions. The analysis aims to understand the role of PtDGAT2B in enhancing TAG accumulation and the impact of nitrogen stress on lipid metabolism.

steps.description: Cells were harvested for analysis at 24, 48 and 72 h, corresponding to E and S phases of growth.
steps.searchable_summary: harvest cells at specified time points for analysis
inputs: cell cultures at different growth phases

steps.description: A multivariate statistical approach (PCA) was used to decrypt the significant differences observed in such a comprehensive analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PCA to analyze lipidomic data

steps.description: The relative contribution each lipid has on the direction of each principal component was determined.
steps.searchable_summary: determine lipid contributions to principal components

methods.description: This method describes the extraction and quantitative analysis of total lipids from freeze-dried cells using a modified protocol. The analysis is performed using electrospray ionisation tandem triple-quadrupole mass spectrometry to quantify TAG and polar lipids.

steps.description: 2 mg freeze dried cells were re-suspended in 4 ml propan-2-ol and heated at 80 °C for 10 min.
steps.searchable_summary: re-suspend and heat freeze-dried cells in propan-2-ol

steps.description: The solvent was transferred to a 50-ml stoppered conical flask.
The pellet was then extracted by grinding with a glass homogeniser in 2 ml methanol followed by 8 ml chloroform.
steps.searchable_summary: extract pellet using methanol and chloroform

steps.description: Flasks containing solvent extract were flushed with nitrogen gas and stirred for 1 h at room temperature.
steps.searchable_summary: flush and stir solvent extract with nitrogen gas

steps.description: Samples were filtered through glass wool which was then washed with 3 ml chloroform:methanol (2:1).
steps.searchable_summary: filter and wash samples with chloroform:methanol

steps.description: 5 ml 1% (w/v) NaCl was added to initiate biphase formation and the chloroform phase dried under nitrogen gas.
steps.searchable_summary: add NaCl to form biphase and dry chloroform phase

steps.description: Total lipid extracts were resuspended in chloroform:methanol:ammonium acetate (1:2.2:0.1), filtered, dried under nitrogen, flushed with nitrogen, and stored at −80 °C.
steps.searchable_summary: resuspend, filter, dry, and store lipid extracts

steps.description: Quantitative analyses of TAG and polar lipids were carried out using electrospray ionisation tandem triple-quadrupole mass spectrometry.
steps.searchable_summary: perform quantitative lipid analysis using ESI-MS/MS
